posting.jobTitle: Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning Mechanic Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #81 JATC
posting.locationSummary: Syracuse, Ithaca, Oswego, and Gouverneur, NY area
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at www.ualocal81.org or in person at a Local Union #81 location during the recruitment period. Applications must be received by March 31, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Any Local Union #81 location listed in the posting, including 107 Twin Oaks Drive, Syracuse, NY 13206; 705 East Seneca Street, Oswego, NY 13126; and 701 West State Street, Ithaca, NY 14850.
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, excluding legal holidays.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED. Proof of transcript will be required after selection and prior to enrollment.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #81, including Cayuga, Chemung, Cortland, Franklin, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Onondaga, Oswego, Schuyler, Seneca, St. Lawrence, and Tompkins counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid driver's license and reliable transportation to and from various work sites and classes at the approved school. Apprentices may be required to drive company vehicles.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must prove negative on a drug screening at the sponsor's expense at the time of appointment.
posting.classRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED. Proof of transcript will be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.

Must attest in writing that they are physically able to perform the work of the trade, including working with sharp objects, hazardous machinery, and possible exposure to loud noises and respiratory irritants; prolonged standing and walking; repeated squatting and/or bending; working in severe weather conditions and extreme temperatures; working in confined spaces; working in wet and muddy conditions; lifting and/or moving heavy objects and equipment; and working off ladders and scaffolds at various heights.

Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #81, which includes Cayuga, Chemung, Cortland, Franklin, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Onondaga, Oswego, Schuyler, Seneca, St. Lawrence, and Tompkins counties.
Must have a valid driver's license. Apprentices may be required to drive company vehicles. Proof will be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and classes at the approved school.
Must prove negative on a drug screening, at the expense of the sponsor, at the time of appointment.
Must provide military transfer card or discharge form DD-214, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must take and pass the Bennett Mechanical Comprehension Test.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, have a high school diploma or equivalency, live within the Local Union #81 jurisdiction, have a valid driver's license and reliable transportation, pass a drug screen and Bennett test, and meet the physical and documentation requirements.
posting.contactSummary: Contact Local Union #81 for more information about the apprenticeship.
